response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and AI-agent infrastructure experience, particularly with TypeScript, Node.js, and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tools. While his AI/GenAI experience is not explicitly detailed as 8+ years, his recent work at re:cinq and open-source contributions suggest relevant expertise. His leadership in developer tooling and mentorship aligns well with the role, though cloud-specific AI production experience could be clearer.
strengths: Strong full-stack and AI-agent infrastructure experience, including MCP and agentic workflows.
Proven leadership in developer tooling, mentorship, and technical discovery (e.g., workshops, talks).
Diverse technical background with cloud-adjacent skills (AWS, Kubernetes) and open-source contributions.
concerns: AI/GenAI production experience is not explicitly quantified as 8+ years in the resume.
Limited explicit mention of vector databases or RAG architectures in recent roles.
Cloud platform experience (AWS/GCP/Azure) is implied but not detailed for AI-specific use cases.
